item.title: You cannot know the weight of what you carry until you set it down.
item.description: I am 64 years old and have been struggling with mild depression my whole life. Wellbutrin helped for a few years but went flat. During the trip I found myself asking the question, "is it okay to spend the day laying around tripping" and the response was, "you have permission". When I came down I felt like the weight of the world was taken off my shoulders. The constant chatter in my head is gone. I wake up in the morning free of dread. I can listen to music, or work on a task, without feeling guilty about neglecting another task or other intruding thoughts. I don't feel the need to pursue time wasting activity (less time on imgur). I am afraid I will do something wrong and break the spell. I am trying to pursue joy and create some habits that will last. Time will tell, but I am hopeful. I am in Oregon where this is legal (at the state level). This is my first post. Not sure if I am doing it right. First time I felt like had something to share.
item.dc:creator: oftenconfused

item.title: Murder She Avoided

item.title: Move 2028 Olympics
item.description: Olympics Contact form: https://support.olympics.com/hc/en-gb/requests/new Publicly available contact list for the IOC (International Olympic Committee): https://stillmed.olympics.com/media/Documents/International-Olympic-Committee/IOC-Publications/IOC-Members-Directory.pdf —- An example of why it’s not safe: The story of an Australian MMA coach sent to a harrowing detention prison upon arriving in the US with a visa to lead a seminar. https://www.instagram.com/p/DIEA_nBpCCJ/ —- Do not come to the former United States unless absolutely necessary, it’s not safe here, especially for non-citizens.

I have also scanned as much as I can and store them on a home server which is password protected.

item.title: Trying to do a serious audition tape
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Body Painted myself as Susan Storm from Marvel Rivals!
item.description:
Painted myself as Susan Storm from Marvel Rivals :) Was really fun, I did the vfx/editing myself - tried my best! Thanks for all the nice comments, it's appreciated. Now for the big whammy faq Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror No, it is not AI I don’t recreate the reference photo like for like so I’ve put in a photo, but I prefer to change parts of the design to make it more “my version”. I use professional body paint covers (pasties) this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle “Why don’t you just wear clothes” once again, body painting myself is my hobby/passion. I am painting my skin, I am not wearing a suit - but that does not mean I am naked. I know, even I think this is a ridiculous set of questions I have to constantly answer I did not go to art school, I am self taught. Talent gets you so far, but this is a learned skill. The paint isn’t edible (gross) I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007, UK 7 is my shoe size No, I don't need help painting my back, I don't want to paint my back, I don't need to paint my back. (also gross) No, I don't need help washing it off. (also you are gross) If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I couldn’t care less if you think they’re cringe. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan I do not have an OF but if you want to send me money THAT badly you can just tip my twitch account. Haha. The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. The reason why it can look different at the end is because I am wearing a wig, I promise you it is not a different person because the hair changed. While on this topic, if my eyes change colour it’s because I am wearing contact lenses. (Those with an IQ above 10… I know. Even I’m shocked the wig thing is a frequent comment). I use body paint. It doesn’t tickle, I am very ticklish and this is fine. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am English, not American. I do not go outside like this to scare people. 1, that would be very cold. 2, in this current age, everyone would take photos without me knowing and it would likely dox me :)))))) I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life It would not be quicker to jump into a pool of paint - think of the drying time?! If you're still here I’m currently doing my makeup for a top secret project with a video game company! I don’t care that I wash it off at the end, I get to reuse this canvas, we love a reduce, reuse, recycle queen. I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself. I know a lot of you don’t like reading this faq because it is horrid to see that I have to answer all of these. Unfortunately I have noticed that when I don’t put in all the icky things then I get more gross comments and I just have to spend more time blocking people so it’s better to call it out. I just copy and paste it each time anyway.
Final photo
Reference
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.dc:creator: Cliperinoposterino

item.title: You don't call Elon Musk, you call us!
item.description: Sean McGarvey - President of North America's Building Trades Unions (NABTU). This is pretty badass. Personal note: The political class is trying their best to put us one against the other. Let me say as a delicate, office-working TRANSGENDER WOMAN I looooooooooooooooooooooooove, value and respect the (mostly) men that do the really hard jobs. People that climb poles in the middle of the night to keep my pampered booty warm, the people making the beautiful roads I drive on to do the silly crap I like to do most, like shop for clothes made for women 25 years younger than me and drink frou-frou drinks. The people building houses, restaurants and doctors offices that keep me happy and healthy: *The carpenters *The truck drivers *The electricians *The plumbers *The sawyers *The brick layers *The concrete workers *The firefighters *The line cooks *The assembly line workers *The window cleaners *The linemen *and all the other things I don't even know people do. If you wear a hard-hat, leather gloves, hearing protection, knee pads, thermal underlayers, welding masks, face-shields, safety glasses, steel toed shoes, etc. etc. etc. I LOVE LOVE LOVE YOU! I can never thank you enough!!!!!! We need to stick together, love one another and fight the takeover of the g@#$^&#ed billonaires and support the unions. (I called out men specifically because I know they get dumped on a lot. Some people think men are privileged. That's not true, 10 or 20%, maybe, I can't say with specificity, are hyper privileged. The rest are just getting by and the bottom few percent are dumped on the hardest)
item.dc:creator: dickblack12

item.title: Caught up on Shoresy, I got hockey brain
item.description:
Goalies are weird. Michaels gets the game stick though
Here are some Shoresy on ice scenes that I like. Couldn't find em all
Missed line: 98? Could buy a house boat with his rookie card. And when 98 jumps over and slashes him
Another good Shoresy line: "I told ya the first time this is how I tell ya the next time." I do play NHL with my bro sometimes
Great juxtaposition of comedy and drama and cinematography. The Jims are beautiful

item.dc:creator: ahorseelbowdeepinme

item.title: Why he's not texting you right now
item.description: Hear hear! But when is right now? There are three likely possibilities; A) The War of the Ring took place in year 3019 of the Third Age but centuries earlier Mordor fielded its first Uruks; and "in 2475 they swept across Ithilien and took Osgiliath" (The Return of the King; Appendix A; I; IV). They were soon ousted, but the former capital city, divided by the river Anduin, was not resettled. B) On June 20 in 3018 "Sauron attacks Osgiliath" (RotK; Appendix B). Later Boromir told how "sudden war came upon us out of Mordor, and we were swept away" (The Fellowship of the Ring; II; II). Over the next fortnight "Boromir and Faramir were able to drive back the enemy" from the western side of the city (Unfinished Tales; III; IV). C) The most plausible answer is sometime close to or in March 3019, in preparation for the War of the Ring, when on the 12th forces from Minas Morgul, led by the Witch-king, attacked Faramir and his soldiers on the western shore. The "passage of Anduin was won by the Enemy" (RotK; V; IV), though Osgiliath was finally recaptured after a great victory by Gondor and Rohan on the 15th.
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: What Happened Today #73
item.description: Democracy doesn’t collapse all at once. It erodes, then it burns. Trump is tightening control by expanding deportations, threatening media with billion-dollar lawsuits, and defying courts that call his actions illegal. War escalates abroad while protests rise at home. Subscribe free at https://govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/shapiro-arson 2. https://go.govbrief.today/lutnick-electronics 3. https://go.govbrief.today/60minutes-trump 4. https://go.govbrief.today/yemen-april13 5. https://go.govbrief.today/venezuelans-salvador 6. https://go.govbrief.today/abrego-garcia-april13 7. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-physical 8. https://go.govbrief.today/ozturk-memo 9. https://go.govbrief.today/marocco-state 10. https://go.govbrief.today/april13

item.title: This is the CECOT Prison in El Salvadore
item.description: “The Salvadoran government does not plan to release any prisoner from CECOT, and Minister of Justice and Public Security Villatoro has stated that prisoners incarcerated at CECOT will never return to their communities. Villatoro also ruled out rehabilitation programs for CECOT's inmates.” CECOT is where prisoners go to die. This is what an updated Auschwitz, American style, looks like, supported in part by U.S. tax dollars. https://open.substack.com/pub/antoniazk/p/the-conditions-of-cecot-the-prison https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/resources/idt-81749d7c-d0a0-48d0-bb11-eaab6f1e6556 https://www.cnn.com/2024/11/06/americas/el-salvador-inside-cecot-prison/index.html https://apnews.com/article/el-salvador-trump-prison-immigrants-4ab3fc3c0474efb308084604b61f8a37

item.title: #Resist everything. Even little things. Even if you feel silly doing it. Fight. Back. Every. Possible. Way.
item.description: Flip off a Tesla. Boo a politician. Make every moment, of every day as hard and uncomfortable for them as you can. Join #bluesky and follow #teslatakedown and #handsoff tags and accounts. We're less than a year in. This is the beginning, not the end. Time to get up.
item.dc:creator: SamB

item.title: Which one of you jerks did this?
item.description: Crosswalks across Silicon Valley were hacked this weekend. Pressing the button now triggers a message impersonating Elon Musk—mocking him in the process. Videos have been circulating online all weekend. Source: 2600 Magazine social media
item.dc:creator: MayMyEnemiesLiveLong
